languages.title: Kasa
languages.subtitle: Paw kasa a wode bedi dwuma wɔ app no ​​nyinaa mu.
languages.noResults: Kasa biara nni hɔ a ɛne wo hwehwɛ no hyia.

phone.label: Telefon nɔma
phone.searchCountry: Hwehwɛ ɔman, koodu, anaa dialing prefix
phone.noCountries: Aman biara nni hɔ a ɛne wo hwehwɛ no hyia.
phone.tooShort: Saa telefon nɔma yi yɛ tiaa dodo.
phone.tooLong: Saa telefon nɔma yi ware dodo.
phone.invalid: Hyehyɛ telefon nɔma a ɛfata ma ɔman a woapaw no.
phone.valid: Amanaman ntam telefon nɔma a ɛfata

auth.onboardingTagline: Ankorankoro ahobammɔ hokafo ma mmere a ɛda “Me ho ye” ne “Mehia mmoa” ntam.
auth.createSubtitle: Paw ɔkwan a wobɛfa so akɔ mu de abɔ wo ahobammɔ graph no ho ban.
auth.verifyCode: Hwɛ sɛ koodu no yɛ nokware
auth.signInFailedMessage: Yɛantumi anwie sign-in no. Hwɛ wo nkitahodi no na sɔ hwɛ bio.
auth.googleUnavailableTitle: Google Nkɔmmɔbɔ no ntumi nyɛ adwuma
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Mpɔtam hɔ nkɔso nhyiam a wɔde bedi dwuma. Native Google Sign-In yɛ adwuma wɔ nkɔsoɔ dan mu.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Pair mprempren anaa toa so na fa ka ho akyiri yi.
auth.northStarBody: VL01 wearable no betumi akanyan ahobammɔ nsu a ɛsen denam tap ne press gestures tenten so.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Wo ahobammɔ hokafo a odwo wɔ asase mfonini so ne frɛ mu.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear betumi aboa wɔ fie tebea, ɔwɛmfo tebea, ntɛmpɛ tebea, anoyi frɛ, ne nne mmoa mu.
auth.remindersReady: Nkaebɔ a ɛyɛ brɛoo ayɛ krado.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Wɔde di dwuma ma asase mfonini, asiane mmeae, ahobammɔ a ɛba, ne SOS nsɛm a ɛfa ho.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving bisa beaeɛ sɛdeɛ ɛbɛyɛ a ahwɛfoɔ bɛtumi ate baabi a mmoa bɛtumi ahia ase. Wubetumi asesa eyi akyiri yi wɔ Settings mu.
permissions.allowLocation: Ma kwan ma beae a wowɔ
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Amanneɛbɔ ahorow boa check-ins ne nsɛm a egye ntɛmpɛ.
permissions.notificationsBody: Yɛde amanneɛbɔ di dwuma ma ahobammɔ ho nsɛm, ntɛmpɛ mu nsɛm foforo, ne nkaebɔ a woama ayɛ adwuma nkutoo.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Beae a ɛwɔ no ma ahobammɔ ho nsɛm a ɛfa ho no yɛ nokware
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving de wo beaeɛ di dwuma ma ahobanbɔ map, asiane mmeaeɛ, kyɛfa ntɛmntɛm, ne SOS nsɛm a ɛfa ho. Wubetumi asesa eyi akyiri yi wɔ Settings mu.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: Ahobammɔ ho kɔkɔbɔ hia sɛ wɔbɔ amanneɛ
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving de nkaeɛbɔ a ɛfa check-in, ntɛmpɛ ho nsɛm foforɔ, ne ahobanbɔ ho nsɛm a woahyɛ mu den mena. Yɛmfa amanneɛbɔ nni dwuma mma dawurubɔ ahorow.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Microphone ma ahobammɔ frɛ ahorow ahoɔden
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving de wo microphone di dwuma bere a woafi ase AI hokafo anaa ahobammɔ frɛ nkutoo.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleTitle: Bluetooth na ɛka wo wearable no bom
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving de Bluetooth di dwuma de bɔ NorthStar agude, kenkan nkitahodi tebea, na ɛkanyan ahobammɔ nsu a ɛsen fi nea wɔhyɛ no mu.
permissions.cameraRationaleTitle: Camera yɛ nea obi betumi apaw
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving de kamera no di dwuma bere a wopaw sɛ wobɛtwe profile mfonini anaasɛ wobɛkyɛ ahobammɔ mfonini nkutoo.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving ma saa nsuo yi kɔ so firi Nsiesiei ne dashboard no so.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Paw ɔhokafo nne a ɛte nka sɛ ahobammɔ wom sen biara sɛ wobɛte.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Hwɛ a wɔyɛ komm de hwɛ ahobammɔ da biara da.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Ka nsɛm a ɛfa ho kyerɛ nnipa a wogye wɔn di.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Tap anum betumi akɔ soro akodu SOS ne ɔwɛmfo kɔkɔbɔ ahorow.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Bɔ ntease a ɛyɛ fɛ a enti wubefi tebea bi a ɛnyɛ dɛ mu.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Fi ase frɛ ɔhokafo frɛ wɔ bere ankasa mu bere a wuhia mmoa no.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Sɔ ahobammɔ nsuo a ɛsen wɔ low-pressure demo mu hwɛ.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Fa agude no sie baabi a ɛbɛn wo bere a woreyɛ scan no.
jewelry.noDevices: Wonhuu NorthStar mfiri biara a ɛbɛn hɔ.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth scanning no antumi amfi ase. Yɛsrɛ sɛ sɔ hwɛ bio.
jewelry.scanFailed: Yɛantumi anhu agude a ɛbɛn hɔ. Hwɛ Bluetooth , ma NorthStar nkɔ, na sɔ hwɛ bio.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth scanning no antumi amfi ase. Hwɛ Bluetooth kwan na sɔ hwɛ bio.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Nearby-device access no adum. Ma Bluetooth kwan ma ɔkɔ mu wɔ Nsiesiei mu, afei sɔ hwɛ bio.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar gyee bere tenten dodo sɛ ɛbɛka ho. Fa bɛn no na bɔ mmɔden bio.
jewelry.connectFailed: Yɛantumi ankɔ NorthStar so. Hwɛ sɛ wɔabɔ ho ka na ɛbɛn hɔ, afei sɔ hwɛ bio.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Mfiri biara nni hɔ a ɛbɛn hɔ de besi nnɛ
jewelry.emptyMessage: Ma NorthStar charged na bɛn fon yi, afei scan bio.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Worehwehwɛ NorthStar mfiri a ɛbɛn wo...

home.noDevice: Mfiri biara nni hɔ a wɔde abɔ mu

map.retry: San sɔ beae a wowɔ no hwɛ
map.title: Ahobammɔ ho asase mfonini
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go nhwɛsoɔ; Mapbox renders wɔ nkɔsoɔ dan mu.
map.refresh: Fa beae a wɔyɛ no foforo
map.updateFailed: Yɛantumi anyɛ beae a wowɔ no foforo. Yɛsrɛ sɛ sɔ hwɛ bio.
map.notRequested: Wɔammisa beae a wɔbɛkɔ no. Wubetumi ama ayɛ adwuma akyiri yi afi Settings so.
map.permissionOff: Beae a wɔde kɔ hɔ no yɛ off. Ma no nyɛ adwuma wɔ Settings mu na ɛnyɛ ahobammɔ map no mfinimfini wɔ wo so.
map.timeout: Beae a wowɔ no regye bere tenten sen sɛnea na wɔhwɛ kwan. Tu kɔ baabi a ɛwɔ sɛnkyerɛnne a emu da hɔ na bɔ mmɔden bio.
map.savedEmptyTitle: Mmeae biara nni hɔ a wɔakora so de besi nnɛ
map.savedEmptyMessage: Mmeae a wugye di a wode sie no bɛda adi wɔ ha na ama woatumi akɔ hɔ ntɛm.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Fa bundled companion responses di dwuma bere a network anaa Hume credentials no nni hɔ.

sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar , ahwɛfoɔ, ne wɔn a wɔne wɔn di nkitaho wɔ ntɛmpɛ mu

contacts.emptyMessage: Fa obi a wowɔ ne mu ahotoso ka ho sɛnea ɛbɛyɛ a obesiesie ne ho bere a ahobammɔ nsu a ɛsen biara hia no.
contacts.removeMessage: Saa onipa yi renpue bio wɔ wo ntɛmpɛ nsuo no mu.
contacts.nameRequired: Hyehyɛ nea wo ne no di nkitaho no din.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Yɛantumi ankora saa nkitahodi yi so. Hwɛ nsɛm no mu nsɛm no mu na sɔ hwɛ bio.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Yɛantumi ayi saa nkitahodi yi mfi hɔ. Yɛsrɛ sɛ sɔ hwɛ bio.

friends.subtitle: Awɛmfo, abisade ahorow, ne ntɛmpɛ ho mfonini.

friends.emptyMessage: Nnamfo ne ahwɛfo a wogye wɔn di bɛba ha bere a wɔde wɔn aka ho no.

emergency.title: Ntɛmntɛm SOS
emergency.subtitle: Escalate bere a wuhia mmoa ntɛm ara nkutoo.
emergency.body: Eyi bɛma woabɔ wo ahobammɔ ho amanneɛ na asiesie nkitahodi ahorow a egye ntɛmpɛ.
emergency.notificationBody: Wo ntɛmpɛ nsuo no ayɛ krado.
emergency.addContact: Fa ntɛmpɛ nkitahodi bi ka ho wɔ Settings mu.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Beae a wɔkyɛ stub no ayɛ krado. Fa backend share endpoint no bata ho na fa live links mena.

quickShare.title: Kyɛfa ntɛmntɛm
quickShare.subtitle: Beae kyɛfa nsuo no ayɛ krado.

capybearTap.title: Capybear abɔ so
capybearTap.subtitle: Klik wo NorthStar mprenu na fa ahobammɔ borɔdɔma bi to fam.
capybearTap.body: Gesture kwan no ayɛ krado ama BLE event wiring.

debug.title: VeryLoving debug krataafa no
debug.subtitle: Ɔkwan a wɔfa so nya nkɔso nkutoo.

errors.voiceOffline: Ɛte sɛ nea wo nni intanɛt so. Wɔde wo nkrasɛm no bɛmena bere a woasan akɔka wo ho no.
errors.voiceQueued: Nkrasɛm a wɔakora so. Wɔde bɛmena bere a ɛnne hokafo no asan abɔ mu no.
errors.voiceRetrying: Worebɔ mmɔden sɛ wode wo nkra no bɛsan akɔma bio...
errors.voiceConnecting: Nkitahodi a ahobammɔ wom ne wo nne hokafo...
errors.microphone: Microphone a wɔde di dwuma ho hia na wɔde nne frɛ. Wubetumi ama ayɛ adwuma wɔ Settings mu, anaasɛ wobɛkyerɛw nkra mmom.
errors.billing: Intanɛt so nne hokafo no nni hɔ bere tiaa bi. Wubetumi akɔ so ne offline hokafo no.
errors.authentication: Ɛnne hokafo no antumi ankyerɛ sɛ saa nhyiam yi yɛ nokware. Sign in bio anaa fa offline companion no di dwuma mprempren.
errors.timeout: Ɛnne hokafo no gyee bere tenten dodo ansa na ɔrebua. Hwɛ wo nkitahodi no na sɔ hwɛ bio.
errors.network: Yɛantumi ankɔ nne hokafo no nkyɛn. Hwɛ wo nkitahodi no, afei sɔ hwɛ bio anaa kɔ so wɔ offline.
errors.genericVoice: Biribi twaa nne frɛ no mu. Sɔ hwɛ bio, anaa toa so ne ofline hokafo no.

privacy.exportTitle: VeryLoving data a wɔde kɔ amannɔne

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving hia microphone kwan ma ahobanbɔ ne AI ɔhokafoɔ frɛ.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving de wo beaeɛ di dwuma ma ahobanbɔ asase mfonini ne ahobanbɔ nneɛma a ɛbɛn hɔ.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving de Bluetooth di dwuma de ka wo NorthStar ahobanbɔ agude no ho.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Saa ɔkwan yi nni adwuma wɔ build yi mu.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Demo mode de local fake data nkutoo na edi dwuma. Wɔnnkyerɛɛ sɛ connected services no yɛ nokware, na sɛ app no san load a, session yi san hyɛ ase.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Verification code no nyɛ nokware anaa ne bere atwam. Bisa code foforo na san sɔ hwɛ.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Woabɔ mmɔden sɛ wobɛkɔ mu mpɛn pii dodo. Twɛn kakra, na san sɔ hwɛ.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Sign-in verification no akyɛ dodo. Hwɛ wo connection na san sɔ hwɛ.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Yɛantumi annya sign-in service no. Hwɛ wo connection na san sɔ hwɛ.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Wo session no bere atwam. San kɔ mu.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Safety map no antumi anload. Hwɛ wo connection na san sɔ hwɛ.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Live location nni hɔ. Yɛrekyerɛ wo location a etwa to a wɔde siei fii %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Yɛantumi ankyɛ wo location. Hwɛ location access na san sɔ hwɛ.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Me location a wɔkyeree no %{capturedAt} ni:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Me location a etwa to a wɔde siei na wɔkyeree no %{capturedAt} ni:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Wɔadum Bluetooth access. Sɔ wɔ Settings mu, na san sɔ hwɛ.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Wɔadum Bluetooth. Sɔ, na san sɔ hwɛ.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Bluetooth pairing nni device anaa build yi so.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Yɛantumi anhu NorthStar. Fa bɛn, hwɛ Bluetooth, na san sɔ hwɛ.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Yɛanhu NorthStar device biara wɔ baabi a ɛbɛn. Fa bɛn na san scan.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Yɛantumi amfa NorthStar ankɔ connection. Hwɛ sɛ charge wɔ mu na ɛbɛn, na san sɔ hwɛ.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Yɛantumi amfa baabi yi ansie. San sɔ hwɛ.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Phone dialer no abue; wɔnnkyerɛɛ sɛ wɔfrɛe.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Emergency contact biara nni hɔ; wɔamfrɛ obiara.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Phone dialer no antumi ammue; wɔamfrɛ obiara.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Wɔantumi ankyerɛ SOS mmɔdenbɔ a etwa to no ase.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Voice companion no nni hɔ seesei. San sɔ hwɛ akyiri yi anaa kɔ so ne offline companion no.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
